executiveSummary.text: Home Depot is the dominant US home improvement retailer with unrivalled scale and a high-quality pro-customer ecosystem. Q4 2025 results beat on earnings but missed on sales in a still-challenged housing market — the big ticket categories (kitchens, bathrooms, major renovations) remain weak as homeowners sit on the sidelines waiting for mortgage rates to fall. The strategic pivot toward trade professionals (Pro Xtra) and supply house capabilities is the long-term growth driver and differentiates HD from Lowe's. At 23x P/E on ~$15 EPS, Home Depot is not expensive for a business with this franchise durability and 2.4% dividend yield. OPPORTUNISTIC BUY with conviction tempered by the uncertain near-term US housing cycle.
